title: laportea humilis
intro: Laportea humilis, also known as the small nettle tree or dwarf nettle tree, is a type of plant species in the Urticaceae family. It is native to Southeast Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, fever, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Laportea humilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
